scripts.py:check: cd python-src && concurrently "uv run pyright" "uv run ruff check --fix ."
scripts.dev:py: cd python-src && cross-env DEV_SERVER=http://localhost:3000 MTGA_SRC_TAURI_DIR=../src-tauri uv run python -m mtga_app
scripts.pytauri:install:win: cd src-tauri && set PYTAURI_STANDALONE=1 && uv pip install --break-system-packages --exact --python "pyembed\\python\\python.exe" --reinstall-package mtga-app "..\\python-src"
scripts.pytauri:install:mac: cd src-tauri && PYTAURI_STANDALONE=1 uv pip install --break-system-packages --exact --python "./pyembed/python/bin/python3" --reinstall-package mtga-app "../python-src"
scripts.tauri:bundle: node -e "console.log('Use pnpm tauri:bundle:win or pnpm tauri:bundle:mac')"
scripts.tauri:bundle:win: pnpm pytauri:install:win && copy /Y .env src-tauri\pyembed\python\Lib\ && for %I in (src-tauri\pyembed\python\python.exe) do set PYO3_PYTHON=%~fI && pnpm -- tauri build
scripts.tauri:bundle:mac: pnpm pytauri:install:mac && cp .env src-tauri/pyembed/python/lib/python3.13 && export PYO3_PYTHON=$(realpath ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/bin/python3) && export RUSTFLAGS="-C link-arg=-Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/../Resources/pyembed/python/lib -L $(realpath ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/lib)" && install_name_tool -id '@rpath/libpython3.13.dylib' ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/lib/libpython3.13.dylib && pnpm -- tauri build
scripts.tauri:bundle:win:ci: pnpm pytauri:install:win && for %I in (src-tauri\pyembed\python\python.exe) do set PYO3_PYTHON=%~fI && pnpm -- tauri build -- --profile bundle-release
scripts.tauri:bundle:mac:ci: pnpm pytauri:install:mac && export PYO3_PYTHON=$(realpath ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/bin/python3) && export RUSTFLAGS="-C link-arg=-Wl,-rpath,@executable_path/../Resources/pyembed/python/lib -L $(realpath ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/lib)" && install_name_tool -id '@rpath/libpython3.13.dylib' ./src-tauri/pyembed/python/lib/libpython3.13.dylib && pnpm -- tauri build -- --profile bundle-release
